etymology.description: The word 金竹果 (jīn zhú guǒ) refers to a fruit known as the 'jinzhu fruit'. The characters are combined to create a description of this specific fruit.
etymology.interpretation: This word forms a specific name for a fruit by combining elements that relate to its characteristics.

examples.chinese: 金竹果是一种罕见而美味的水果(金竹果是一種罕見而美味的水果)。
examples.pinyin: Jīn zhú guǒ shì yī zhǒng hǎn jiàn ér měi wèi de shuǐ guǒ.
examples.english: Jinzhu fruit is a rare and delicious fruit.

examples.chinese: 吃金竹果可以提高免疫力(吃金竹果可以提高免疫力)。
examples.pinyin: Chī jīn zhú guǒ kě yǐ tí gāo miǎn yì lì.
examples.english: Eating jinzhu fruit can boost immunity.

examples.chinese: 她在市场上买了一篮(金竹果)和一些新鲜蔬菜(她在市場上買了一籃(金竹果)和一些新鮮蔬菜)。
examples.pinyin: Tā zài shì chǎng shàng mǎi le yī lán (jīn zhú guǒ) hé yī xiē xīn xiān shū cài.
examples.english: She bought a basket of jinzhu fruit and some fresh vegetables at the market.
